articles.title: It’s not just vaccines — parents are refusing other routine preventive care for newborns - AP News
articles.description: Doctors across the nation are alarmed that skepticism fueled by rising anti-science sentiment and medical mistrust is increasingly reaching beyond vaccines to other safe and routine care for babies. A recent study in the Journal of the American Medical Associ…
articles.content: One day at an Idaho hospital, half the newborns Dr. Tom Patterson saw didnt get the vitamin K shots that have been given to babies for decades to prevent potentially deadly bleeding. On another recen… [+7573 chars]

articles.author: Jordain Carney
articles.title: 'This is about attention': Mike Lee's MAGA crusade is driving his colleagues crazy - Politico
articles.description: The Utah Republican’s crusade for the SAVE America Act has strained his relations inside the Senate GOP.
articles.content: That seems to be a self-serving attempt at elevating yourself at the expense of your Republican colleagues, and I dont have any patience for that sort of stuff, Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) said in an i… [+8536 chars]
